subject: Master Roshi, the Turtle Hermit — a short, elderly martial arts master in a red-and-white Hawaiian-style shirt and sunglasses, standing in composed pose
description: A short, stocky elderly man with a large white beard stands in a composed three-quarter pose. He wears a wide-brimmed hat, dark sunglasses, and what appears to be a Hawaiian-style patterned shirt. His posture is relaxed but carries an air of quiet authority. The figure's distinctive visual markers — white beard, sunglasses, compact build, wide hat — are the canonical design elements of the Turtle Hermit character from Dragon Ball media. The background uses warm earthy or indoor tones consistent with a tournament setting.
foreground: short stocky elderly man with white beard, wide hat, sunglasses, patterned shirt, composed stance
background: warm earthy tones, muted indoor or arena setting
